- `PaymentInput` - input data

- `PaymentGateway` - has a method to process payment
- `PaymentResult` - `{ success: true, transaction_id: string }`

- `FRAUD_SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE`

content.content:
PASS ./processPayment.test.ts
  AC1 – valid input
    ✓ calls fraud check then gateway and returns { success: true, transaction_id } (1 ms)
    ✓ preserves the transaction_id returned by the gateway
  AC2 + AC6 – fraud detected
    ✓ throws PaymentError with code FRAUD_DETECTED
    ✓ does NOT call the payment gateway when fraud is detected (AC6) (3 ms)
  AC3 – payment gateway decline
    ✓ throws PaymentError with code PAYMENT_DECLINED
    ✓ includes the decline reason from the gateway in the error message (1 ms)
    ✓ uses fallback message when gateway provides no decline_reason
  AC4 – fraud service network error
    ✓ throws PaymentError with code FRAUD_SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
    ✓ chains the original error as .cause
    ✓ does NOT call the payment gateway when fraud service is unavailable
  AC5 – payment gateway network error
    ✓ throws PaymentError with code GATEWAY_UNAVAILABLE
    ✓ chains the original error as .cause (1 ms)
  call ordering invariant
    ✓ always calls fraud check before gateway (1 ms)

Test Suites: 1 passed, 1 total
Tests:       13 passed, 13 total
Snapshots:   0 total
Time:        0.616 s
Ran all test suites.
